items.name: Cyber Stealth Goggles
items.description: The glasses themselves aren't stealthy, but they will allow you to be!

items.name: Crimson Vision Night Goggles
items.description: Seeing night vision in red is much easier than green, unless your target writes in red pen.

items.name: Computerized Sniper Goggles
items.description: His vision is clear, his aim is true.

items.name: Reconnaissance Goggles
items.description: You can see people that are miles away like they're right next to you!

items.name: Bloxxadore Domino Mask
items.description: For every hundred ninjas all in black there must be one hero who stands apart. One hero who is not afraid to be noticed. One hero who kicks blox and takes names. That hero is the Bloxxadore!

items.name: Chrome Glasses
items.description: Because you're liable to bump into someone when you wear these...

items.name: Flame Vision Goggles
items.description: Renders raging fires meaningless.

items.name: Labor Day 2009 Gear Goggles
items.description: Labor Day originally celebrated workers with a parade, now it celebrates hot dogs and hamburgers.  Yum.

items.name: Neon Party Glasses
items.description: I love the nightlife!

items.name: Desert Airbreather
items.description: To survive in this wind blown dust bowl of a land, you must never uncover your mouth.

items.name: Steel Shutter Goggles
items.description: Your eyes are important. Protect them.

items.name: Tribal Mask
items.description: Drum. Chant. Dance.

items.name: Mardi Skull Mask
items.description: Should be worn on Tuesdays only...nah j/k.

items.name: Elf Goggles
items.description: Santa's sleigh is pretty fast. You'll need these goggles before you go on the Christmas adventure of a lifetime!

items.name: Hazardous Waste Goggles
items.description: Radioactive waste has nothing on you...

items.name: Steampunk Science Goggles
items.description: Give me steam/ And how you feel to make it real / Real as any place you've been.

items.name: Brilliant Snowboard Goggles
items.description: The snow is brilliant and you're ready to shred.

items.name: Poison Vision Goggles
items.description: Can't you see that I'm toxic?

items.name: Gearloose Goggles
items.description: "If I have not seen as far as others, it is because giants were standing on my shoulders."

items.name: Neon Chrome Glasses
items.description: How did our pixel scientists even come up with neon chrome? I have no idea, but wow that is some futuristic next level stuff.

items.name: Crazyvision Goggles
items.description: These goggles will make you look crazy instantly.  Wearing these is a great way to avoid people you don't want to run into... all people really.

items.name: Orange Goggles
items.description: They are intended for high-speed double black diamond skiers, but they're also fun at parties.

items.name: Crazy Glasses
items.description: And now... something for the ladies.

items.name: Neon Punk Goggles
items.description: You're a punk. You're neon.

items.name: Overseer Oversleeper Sleep Mask
items.description: Even Overseers need their beauty sleep.

items.name: Steel Surveillance Goggles
items.description: He can perceive a threat 100 miles away.  Yeah...they're that good.

items.name: Palm Tree Sunglasses
items.description: This is taking the island lifestyle a bit too far I think.

items.name: Cyber Goggles
items.description: See deep into the metaverse with these cyber goggles.

items.name: Cool Kid Goggles
items.description: You're the coolest kid on the slopes and everyone knows it.

items.name: Red Mardi Gras Mask
items.description: Mardi Gras is French for "Fat Tuesday" (in ethnic English tradition, Shrove Tuesday), referring to the practice of the last night of eating richer, fatty foods before the ritual fasting of the Lenten season, which started on Ash Wednesday. Related popular practices were associated with celebrations before the fasting and religious obligations associated with the penitential season of Lent.
